ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object (e.g., machine part, raw material) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the object in the production line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the object (e.g., in-use, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the object */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was created or registered in the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the object details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object to which the property belongs */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., Property1, Property2) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., physical, chemical) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property value was last updated */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the property is critical for production */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from where the property value was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the property that was changed */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the property before the change */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the property after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audit_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audit_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor in the production line */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)
